---
---
# Public Knowledge Studio

> Public Knowledge is a design studio that makes technology work for humans. Based in India, we are a design partner for early-stage startups — crafting brands, building products, and creating websites that attract users and investors.

The studio was founded in 2024. We focus on design, not development — though we build front-ends and can recommend trusted developers. We work with startups at the earliest stages, from first pitch deck to launched product.

## Services

- [Brandwork and Identity](https://publicknowledge.co): Distinctive, versatile brand identities that translate across digital and real-world touchpoints
- [Interface & Experience Design](https://publicknowledge.co): Custom web and app interfaces — no templates, no generic UI kits
- [Development](https://publicknowledge.co): Accessible, performant front-ends that integrate seamlessly with engineering teams
- [Product and Service Strategy](https://publicknowledge.co): Design-led inquiry to uncover what's not working and shape grounded interventions

## Blog

- [Design Process](https://publicknowledge.co/blog/design-process): How Public Knowledge Studio approaches design projects
- [FAQs](https://publicknowledge.co/blog/faqs): Frequently asked questions about working with Public Knowledge Studio
- [Ways of Working](https://publicknowledge.co/blog/ways-of-working): Our principles and practices for doing great design work
- [Internship](https://publicknowledge.co/blog/internship): What to expect from a design internship at Public Knowledge Studio

## Team

- [Team](https://publicknowledge.co/team): Current and previous team members

## Optional

- [Blog](https://publicknowledge.co/blog): Full journal with all posts
- [Vibe Code Your Portfolio](https://publicknowledge.co/blog/vibe-code-your-portfolio): Our talk at the Delhi Config Watch Party 2025 about portfolios and AI coding tools
- [Keep the Web Weird](https://publicknowledge.co/blog/keep-the-web-weird-design-degree-showcase-iit-delhi): Using AI to make weird things with code, and resisting the flattening of the web
- [Case Studies We Like](https://publicknowledge.co/blog/case-studies-we-like): Work by other studios we like
- [Website Inspiration](https://publicknowledge.co/blog/website-inspiration): Sites that we love
